title: Electronic Invoicing Platform
overview: Tax-compliant electronic invoicing system integrated with the Dominican Republic's DGII (tax authority). Handles XML document generation, digital certificate signing, JWT authentication, and real-time validation against government web services.
challenges: Implementing DGII's XML schema with strict validation rules and digital signature requirements
Managing certificate lifecycle and secure key storage for production environments
Handling asynchronous response polling from government endpoints with retry logic and fault tolerance
results: Processed thousands of invoices with high submission success rate
Reduced invoice processing time from minutes to under 3 seconds
Zero compliance violations since deployment

title: SaloNET
overview: Multi-tenant SaaS platform for e-NCF electronic invoicing and commission management in the Dominican Republic. Built on .NET 9.0 and PostgreSQL, it handles tenant isolation, fiscal document generation compliant with DGII regulations, and commission tracking across business units. All user-facing UI is in Spanish.
challenges: Designing a robust multi-tenant architecture with strict data isolation between tenants
Implementing e-NCF fiscal document generation and DGII compliance rules per tenant
Building a commission tracking engine that handles complex business rules across multiple entities
results: Deployed to production serving multiple tenants with zero cross-tenant data leakage
Full DGII e-NCF compliance achieved with automated fiscal document workflows
Commission module reduced manual reconciliation effort significantly

title: Telephone Extensions
overview: Internal telephony management system for handling PBX extension assignments, call routing configurations, and employee directory integration. Provides a web interface for managing extensions across multiple office locations.
challenges: Integrating with existing PBX infrastructure and managing extension provisioning programmatically
Designing a user-friendly interface for non-technical staff to manage their own extensions
Handling multi-site configurations with different PBX systems and numbering schemes
results: Eliminated manual extension management, reducing IT support tickets
Real-time extension directory accessible across all office locations
Automated provisioning reduced setup time for new employees

title: Queue Management System
overview: Full-stack queue management platform built with ASP.NET Core 9, Blazor, PostgreSQL, SignalR, and RabbitMQ. Covers the entire customer-flow lifecycle: ticket issuance at kiosks, real-time calling on display screens, operator workstations, analytics, and fine-grained role management.
challenges: Building real-time display updates across kiosks, operator stations, and screens using SignalR with guaranteed message delivery
Designing a RabbitMQ-based event pipeline to decouple ticket issuance from screen notifications at scale
Implementing fine-grained role management covering kiosk operators, supervisors, and display-only screens
results: End-to-end customer flow covered from ticket issuance to service completion with real-time visibility
Sub-second update latency on all display screens under concurrent load
Analytics dashboard providing service time metrics and operator performance insights

title: Authentication & Security System
overview: Comprehensive authentication and authorization system with JWT access/refresh token flow, API key management, role-based permissions, and full integration test coverage. Built to handle enterprise security requirements across multiple applications.
challenges: Implementing secure JWT refresh token rotation with proper token revocation and family detection
Designing an API key system with scoped permissions, rate limiting, and usage tracking
Achieving high integration test coverage including authentication edge cases and token expiration scenarios
results: Zero security incidents related to authentication since deployment
Comprehensive test suite covering all authentication flows and edge cases
Reusable authentication middleware adopted across multiple internal projects

title: WCF/ASMX Services
overview: Enterprise SOAP-based web services built with WCF and ASMX for legacy system integrations. Handles inter-system communication, data transformation, and protocol bridging between modern and legacy applications.
challenges: Maintaining backward compatibility while extending service contracts for new consumers
Handling complex XML transformations between disparate system schemas
Ensuring reliable message delivery in high-throughput production environments
results: Reliable inter-system communication with minimal downtime
Successfully bridged legacy and modern systems without disrupting existing integrations
Comprehensive logging and monitoring for troubleshooting production issues

title: Windows Forms Applications
overview: Desktop applications built with Windows Forms for internal business operations. Feature-rich interfaces for data entry, reporting, and workflow management used daily by enterprise teams.
challenges: Designing complex data entry forms that enforce business rules while remaining user-friendly
Integrating with multiple data sources including SQL Server and external APIs
Implementing offline-capable functionality for environments with unreliable connectivity
results: Replaced manual spreadsheet workflows with structured, validated data entry
Reduced data entry errors through built-in validation and business rule enforcement
Applications still in daily production use with minimal maintenance

title: YARP Reverse Proxy
overview: API gateway and reverse proxy implementation using YARP (Yet Another Reverse Proxy) for routing, load balancing, and request transformation across multiple backend services.
challenges: Configuring dynamic route discovery and health checking for backend services
Implementing request/response transformation rules for API versioning and header manipulation
Ensuring high availability and low-latency proxying under production traffic
results: Unified API gateway simplifying client integration with multiple backend services
Dynamic routing configuration without service restarts
Improved observability through centralized request logging and metrics

title: Gitea Configuration
overview: Self-hosted Git server setup and administration using Gitea. Includes repository management, user/organization provisioning, webhook integrations, and migration from previous version control systems.
challenges: Migrating repositories and history from legacy version control systems without data loss
Configuring webhook pipelines to trigger CI/CD builds on push and pull request events
Setting up organization-level permissions and branch protection policies for team workflows
results: Fully self-hosted Git platform with reliable uptime and automated backups
Streamlined developer onboarding with organization-based access control
Seamless integration with TeamCity for automated builds and deployments

title: CI/CD with TeamCity
overview: End-to-end continuous integration and deployment pipelines built on TeamCity. Manages Windows build agents, automated testing, artifact publishing, and deployment workflows across multiple environments.
challenges: Configuring TeamCity build agents on Windows Server with proper .NET SDK and toolchain management
Designing deployment pipelines that handle database migrations safely with rollback capabilities
Establishing build configurations that support multiple branches and environment targets
results: Reduced deployment time from manual hours-long processes to automated minutes
Eliminated deployment-related incidents through automated testing gates
Enabled the team to ship with confidence through consistent, repeatable builds

title: IIS Web Server Management
overview: Production web hosting and application deployment on IIS (Internet Information Services). Covers site configuration, SSL certificate management, application pools, URL rewriting, and performance tuning.
challenges: Managing multiple application pools with proper isolation and resource limits
Automating SSL certificate renewal and binding across dozens of hosted sites
Troubleshooting production performance issues and configuring request queuing under load
results: Reliable hosting platform serving multiple production applications
Automated deployment scripts reducing manual configuration errors
Improved security posture through standardized SSL/TLS configurations
